metadata.seed: I just don’t know what to do Why does everything have to be so difficult

patient.query: I just don’t know what to do Why does everything have to be so difficult

llm_response.response: It sounds like you’re feeling really overwhelmed right now, and that can make even the simplest tasks feel like mountains. Take a moment to breathe and maybe break what’s on your plate into one small, doable step—sometimes just getting one thing done can shift the whole day. If you want, share what’s weighing on you, and we can brainstorm a plan together.
